task_completion.description: Navigate to the Business Assets section in Eramba
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba web interface is visible, showing the 'Business Assets' page or module.

task_completion.description: Open the CSV import interface for Business Assets
task_completion.visual_evidence: An import modal, dropdown, or page specifically for importing Business Assets is open in the Eramba UI.

task_completion.description: Select the correct CSV file for upload
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file picker or upload input field shows 'inventory_import.csv' (from /home/ga/Documents/) selected for upload.

task_completion.description: Map the CSV columns to the correct Eramba fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: The import mapping interface shows the CSV column 'Asset Name' mapped to the Eramba field 'Title', and the CSV column 'Function' mapped to the Eramba field 'Description'.

task_completion.description: Verify the assets are successfully imported into the system
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Business Assets list view displays the newly imported assets (e.g., US-EAST-DB-01, US-WEST-WEB-04). If visible, the description for US-EAST-DB-01 should show 'Primary Customer Database'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eramba web interface to perform the import
integrity.visual_evidence: The import process occurs within a web browser showing the Eramba application, rather than through terminal commands, database scripts, or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent used the CSV import feature rather than creating assets manually
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the CSV upload and column mapping interface, proving the bulk import tool was used instead of the manual 'Add Asset' form.

integrity.description: The final results are displayed in the actual Eramba application
integrity.visual_evidence: The final list of imported assets is shown within the Eramba UI's data grid, not in a text editor, local spreadsheet, or mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file is located at /home/ga/Documents/inventory_import.csv. The expected imported assets are: US-EAST-DB-01, US-WEST-WEB-04, EU-FR-API-02, BAK-SRV-09, and DEV-BUILD-01. The asset 'US-EAST-DB-01' should have a description containing 'Primary Customer Database'.
